name: cms-microblog
title: pg-cms Microblog
description: Start a microblog post in render-engine-pg-cms from the active browser tab.
author: kjaymiller

commands.name: microblog-current-tab
commands.title: Microblog Current Tab
commands.subtitle: pg-cms
commands.description: Grab the frontmost browser's active tab and open the microblog composer prefilled. Does not publish.

commands.name: quick-post
commands.title: Quick Microblog Post
commands.subtitle: pg-cms
commands.description: Compose a microblog in a Raycast form, then open the composer prefilled to review and publish. Does not publish.

preferences.name: cmsBase
preferences.title: CMS Base URL
preferences.description: Root URL of your render-engine-pg-cms instance.

preferences.name: contentType
preferences.title: Content Type
preferences.description: The content type slug to create (the {name} in /c/{name}/new).

preferences.name: fetchImage
preferences.title: External Image
preferences.label: Pull the page's og:image into image_url
preferences.description: Fetch the tab's page and prefill the external image from its og:image / twitter:image meta tag.

preferences.name: seedContentWithTitle
preferences.title: Seed Content
preferences.label: Prefill content with the page title when no note is given
preferences.description: If you don't type a note, use the page title as the starting content.

preferences.name: defaultBrowser
preferences.title: Default Browser
preferences.description: Which browser's active tab to read. Automatic uses the Raycast Browser Extension, then falls back to whichever browser is frontmost. Pick a specific browser to always read from it, even when it isn't frontmost.
